title: festuca glauca var. gracillior
intro: Festuca glauca var. gracillior, also known as mountain blue fescue or blue fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Festuca glauca var. gracillior include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as skin irritations and respiratory issues.
